blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Requires real ACP agent server accessible via SSH for full E2E flow (configure profile → connect → chat). All individual iOS UI components and Rust transport verified via code review and unit tests.
Requires remote server with Droid agent installed for E2E Droid ACP testing. DroidAcp transport and detection verified via Rust unit tests and code review.
Requires existing ACP session on remote server for session/load E2E testing. Session load infrastructure verified in Rust code (GenericAcpTransport maps session/load → client.session_load()).

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance sections for Rust Unit Tests, iOS Build and Tests, and iOS UI (tuistory) surfaces with isolation rules and boundaries for concurrent testing.
